# Search Debugger - Copilot Instructions

This is a React + Vite project for debugging a Search API with multiple scenarios.

## Project Stack
- React 18
- Vite
- TypeScript

## Steps
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project — Vite 4 + React + TypeScript scaffolded
- [x] Customize the Project — N/A (base architecture only)
- [x] Install Required Extensions — None required
- [x] Compile the Project — Build passes with no errors
- [x] Create and Run Task — Dev server running on http://localhost:5173
- [x] Launch the Project — Dev server started
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete — README.md updated
